official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed iSolved Hire board domain id plus core jobs API.
source_discovery_method: fetch public board HTML and extract embedded JSON or domain id before parsing
list_fetch_method: fetch public board or discovered JSON endpoint with bounded response size
detail_fetch_method: optional detail fetch only when list evidence is insufficient and fixture-backed
pagination_method: follow documented list or embedded next-page data; avoid unbounded DOM crawling
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: url-or-title-inference: Use stable URL id when raw row id is absent.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: detail-page: List cards may omit geo; detail fixture decides whether detail fetch is required.
country_region_city_rule: detail-page: List cards may omit geo; detail fixture decides whether detail fetch is required.
remote_type_rule: url-or-title-inference: Only infer remote/hybrid from explicit card/detail text.
posting_date_rule: detail-page: List cards often omit date; detail fixture decides whether date exists.
rate_limit: one host request at a time with source daily budget and block-rate stop

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: certified parser exists, but live quality gaps require quarantine/detail-refetch before broad public writes

quarantine_reason: registry status is disabled; parser certification is not production promotion

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: monitor with parser stats and live field-quality audit
